author: rotifer-alpha
description: Settles resolved markets: detects closed markets with outcome prices in pre-fetched snapshots and computes final PnL for open positions. Pure computation.

markets.description: All fetched MarketSnapshot objects, including closed/resolved markets

funds.description: Fund configurations for position ownership lookup

settlements.description: Settled trades with realized PnL, entry/exit prices, and fund attribution

transparency.note: Pure computation: settlement detection and PnL calculation on pre-provided market snapshots. No external I/O.
